name: Chop Chae
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak noodles in hot water; drain and chop coarsely.
2. Beat eggs, fry and cut into thin strips. Cut meat into thin pieces and marinate as in Bul-ko-kee.
3. Heat wok; add oil; when hot, add salt and stir-fry vegetables one at a time. As vegetables are cooked, remove and keep warm in a large metal bowl or pot on low heat.
4. Fry meat last; add to vegetables; add noodles; mix well and season to taste with soy sauce and pepper.
5. Garnish with egg strips.
